name: WLF_GRW_ASSIGNMENT_TASKS
description: Table to store Assignment tasks for  Assignment Records of  Guide.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_TASK_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier to represent a row.

columns.Name: GUIDE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment record id of guide for which tasks are related.

columns.Name: TASK_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Who is responsible to finish the task.

columns.Name: TASK_GUIDE_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the task relation id with guide.

columns.Name: GUIDE_ID
columns.Comments: To track parent guide id of the task

columns.Name: GUIDE_TYPE
columns.Comments: To track parent guide id type of the task

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: To track the source object id (example Learning assignment record id ,Journey task Id) of the record creation for this table

columns.Name: SOURCE_OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: To track the source object type (example Learn,Journey) of the record creation for this table

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
